summary: Soundboard recording with mixed‑quality mix but three stellar Jerry-led numbers (Deep Elem, Dire Wolf, China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider) stand out.
review: The set shines on the three Jerry‑centered tunes—Deep Elem, Dire Wolf and the China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence—where his guitar is loud and ripping. The rest of the show is described as so‑so with the “Joan” material falling flat, and the mix fluctuates between very good and noticeably bad, giving an uneven listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 4‑star rating; it praises key performances but notes significant mix issues and weaker material, leading to an overall rating just below the reviewer’s score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix varies—some sections are crisp and loud (especially the Jerry tunes), while others sound muddy or drop in level. Overall sound is decent but inconsistent.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: A small‑venue, rock‑band vibe gives the show an edge; high energy on the three Jerry numbers contrasts with a generally average rest of the set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Ripping guitar, very loud in the mix, especially on Deep Elem, Dire Wolf and China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider.
